case_title: PATRICK ZAPPONI VS. ALESSANDRA GRANELLI et al

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF PATRICK ZAPPONI'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY & FOR DEFENDANTS AND OPPOSING PARTIES. A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1, 3, 4 AND 11; SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGED FACTS SUPPORTING AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 2, 9, 10, 13 AND 15; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 5, 6, 7, 8, 12, 14, AND 16. NOTICE WAIVED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

RULING:
A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF PATRICK ZAPPONI'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER:
OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1, 3, 4 AND 11;
SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGED FACTS SUPPORTING AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 2, 9, 10, 13 AND 15;
SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 5, 6, 7, 8, 12, 14, AND 16.
Notice waived. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
